message:
test(oauth): add comprehensive unit tests for OAuth1, PKCE, and provider modules

Additive test coverage for the fcp-oauth crate:

- oauth1.rs: percent_encode edge cases (empty, unreserved chars, reserved
  chars, space variants, multibyte UTF-8, mixed), signature calculation
  with extra params, query params in URL
- pkce.rs: PKCE challenge/verifier generation and validation tests
- provider.rs: OAuth provider configuration and endpoint tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
